sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH) = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Uses the BRUT_PRIM_TL measure from FACT_POL_POLICE_EK joined with POL_POLICE_OZET and GNL_TARIH to filter by 2025 tanzim tarihi.
risk_notes: Assumes TARIH column stores year as numeric and formatted correctly.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies where the main policy date is in the year 2025?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies where the TANZIM_TARIH_ID corresponds to the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: The TANZIM_TARIH_ID field represents the main policy date.

sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH) = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Alternative join path using ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID to filter by 2025 tanzim tarihi.
risk_notes: Uses ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID instead of TANZIM_TARIH_ID; may differ in data coverage.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies where the main policy date is in the year 2025?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies where the ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID corresponds to the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: The ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID field represents the main policy date.

sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH) = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Uses BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID as an alternative date filter for 2025.
risk_notes: May include records where tanzim tarihi is not 2025 but start date is.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies where the start date is in the year 2025?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies where the BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID corresponds to the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: The BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID field represents the policy start date.
